tasks.label: commit-and-push-workflows
tasks.command: git add .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release.yml .gitignore && git commit -m "chore: add GitHub workflows and update ignore rules" && git push origin main

tasks.label: inspect-git-state
tasks.command: git status -sb && echo '---' && git log --oneline --decorate --graph --max-count=8 --all && echo '---' && git config --get user.name && git config --get user.email

tasks.label: inspect-git-state-no-pager
tasks.command: GIT_PAGER=cat git status -sb; echo '---'; GIT_PAGER=cat git --no-pager log --oneline --decorate --graph --max-count=8 --all; echo '---'; git config --get user.name; git config --get user.email

tasks.label: push-main
tasks.command: git push origin main

tasks.label: push-main-force-with-lease
tasks.command: git push --force-with-lease origin main

tasks.label: fetch-and-force-push
tasks.command: git fetch origin main && git push --force-with-lease origin main

tasks.label: check-gh-auth-user
tasks.command: gh auth status

tasks.label: check-https-credential-username
tasks.command:
printf "protocol=https
host=github.com

" | git credential-osxkeychain get

tasks.label: rewrite-commit-author-noreply
tasks.command: git config user.name "programmable-banking-community" && git config user.email "programmable-banking-community@users.noreply.github.com" && GIT_SEQUENCE_EDITOR=: git rebase --root --exec "git commit --amend --no-edit --reset-author"

tasks.label: force-push-main-after-rewrite
tasks.command: git fetch origin main && git push --force-with-lease origin main

tasks.label: remove-workflows-and-push
tasks.command: git rm --cached .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release.yml && git commit -m "chore: keep workflow files local until workflow-scope token is available" && git fetch origin main && git push --force-with-lease origin main

tasks.label: verify-pushed-author
tasks.command: GIT_PAGER=cat git --no-pager log -1 --pretty=format:'%h%n%an%n%ae%n%s' && echo && git status -sb

tasks.label: push-with-current-creds
tasks.command: GIT_PAGER=cat git status -sb; echo '---'; ls .github/workflows; echo '---'; git push origin main

tasks.label: commit-and-push-workflows-now
tasks.command: git add .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release.yml && git commit -m "ci: add GitHub Actions workflows" && git push origin main

tasks.label: verify-and-push-main-now
tasks.command: GIT_PAGER=cat git status -sb; echo '---'; GIT_PAGER=cat git --no-pager log --oneline --decorate -3; echo '---'; git push origin main

tasks.label: credential-reset-check
tasks.command:
printf "protocol=https
host=github.com

" | git credential-osxkeychain erase; printf "protocol=https
host=github.com

" | git credential reject; git remote -v

tasks.label: reauth-push-attempt
tasks.command: git push origin main

tasks.label: inspect-auth-config
tasks.command: git config --show-origin --get-all credential.helper; echo '---'; git config --show-origin --get-regexp '^credential\..*'; echo '---'; git config --show-origin --get-regexp '^url\..*insteadof$'

tasks.label: set-correct-commit-identity
tasks.command: git config user.name "Programmable Banking Community" && git config user.email "developercommunity@investec.co.za" && git commit --amend --reset-author --no-edit && GIT_PAGER=cat git --no-pager log -1 --pretty=format:'%h%n%an%n%ae%n%s'

tasks.label: push-with-correct-identity-attempt
tasks.command:
printf "protocol=https
host=github.com

" | git credential-osxkeychain erase; printf "protocol=https
host=github.com

" | git credential reject; git push origin main

tasks.label: erase-path-scoped-credential
tasks.command:
printf "protocol=https
host=github.com
path=Investec-Developer-Community/investec-dev-quest.git

" | git credential-osxkeychain get; echo '---'; printf "protocol=https
host=github.com
path=Investec-Developer-Community/investec-dev-quest.git
username=nick-benson_invghcp

" | git credential-osxkeychain erase; printf "protocol=https
host=github.com
path=Investec-Developer-Community/investec-dev-quest.git

" | git credential-osxkeychain get

tasks.label: push-after-path-erase
tasks.command: git push origin main

tasks.label: inspect-hidden-git-auth-overrides
tasks.command: git config --show-origin --get-regexp '^(remote\.origin\.url|credential\..*|http\..*extraheader|url\..*insteadof)$'

tasks.label: dump-git-config-auth
tasks.command: git config --show-origin --list | grep -Ei 'credential|extraheader|insteadof|remote.origin.url'

tasks.label: pin-credential-username
tasks.command: git config credential.username programmable-banking-community && git remote set-url origin https://programmable-banking-community@github.com/Investec-Developer-Community/investec-dev-quest.git && git config --get credential.username && git remote -v

tasks.label: push-after-username-pin
tasks.command: git push origin main
